description: Jam is a bug-reporting and debugging product that captures screen recordings, screenshots, logs, network requests, and device context so teams can reproduce issues. It also routes captured reports into developer, support, and AI workflows.
summary: Jam exposes a remote MCP server at `https://mcp.jam.dev/mcp` and a native `jam` CLI; both authenticate with Jam user OAuth, and both can also use Jam personal access tokens for headless use.
